display.name: By Adam FX 2 shifter + geiss - neon pulse (glow mix) + Rovastar + Orb  + Mstress - mash0000 - prismatic spectral haze filter
display.author: By Adam FX 2 shifter + geiss

annotation.technical_notes: A custom wave equation renders a circular oscilloscope that deforms in response to the high-frequency components of the synthetic test signal. A single custom shape wedge rotates radially around the center, its angular position driven by a time-accumulated variable while its scale responds to the synthetic kick. The rendering is extremely clean with a high decay rate, bypassing sampler_main feedback to maintain a stark, minimalist monochrome aesthetic.
